title: cuatresia harlingiana
intro: Cuatresia harlingiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the Malpighiaceae family, which includes a variety of plants with medicinal properties. Cuatresia harlingiana is reported to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cuatresia harlingiana include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Cuatresia harlingiana is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are typically prepared by steeping the plant's leaves or roots in hot water, although more specific details about herbal preparations are not available.
